productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Embark Black Sandals
description: If comfort is on your mind, these sandals from nike's ACG (All Conditions Gear) range will transport you to heavenly bliss! Stylish, super comfy and lightweight, they will make you feel like you are walking on a bed of roses all day. Ruggedly crafted for casual wear with a tough outsole, you can team them with jeans or shorts and step out in style.UpperSynthetic upper with woven mesh overlays for rugged feel and styleOver-the-foot straps for added comfortVelcro fasteners for ease in removal and wearing, and for a customized FitBack strap to hold the foot firmly in placeNike swoosh on the sideMidsoleAir cushioning unit in the pylon midsole guarantees a smooth and responsive rideWell cushioned footbed for all-day comfortFabric lining for soft touch and protection from blistersOutsoleLightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorptionSquare lugs all over for excellent traction and grip on all surfacesFlex grooves for ease of movementsandal careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
